alkylation reagent: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min at room temperature in the dark
cleavage agent: digested with 1 μg of trypsin (Promega) overnight at room temperature
enrichment method: incubated with equilibrated NeutrAvidin™ Agarose (Pierce) for 15 minutes on ice
fractionation method: the 2D analysis showed that some proteins were preferentially labeled with the surface accessible first probe and other proteins were preferentially labeled by the second probe
fragmentation method: HCD using stepped 15, 30, and 45% normalized collision energy
instrument: eluted in a gradient of 2–80% acetonitrile, 0.5% acetic acid over 220 minutes into an Orbitrap Fusion Eclipse spectrometer
ionization type: analyzed in a Bruker Autoflex Speed MALDI-TOF
reduction reagent: 5 mM β-mercaptoethanol (βME), 0.5 mM PMSF and 50% B-PER (Thermo) (v/v)
reduction concentration: 5 mM β-mercaptoethanol (βME), 0.5 mM PMSF and 50% B-PER (Thermo) (v/v)
